name: Cheese Biscuits (Scones)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450 degrees.
2. Mix Bisquick, water, and cheese in a large bowl until combined.
3. Drop the dough by large spoonfuls onto a greased baking sheet.
4. Bake for 8-10 minutes or until golden brown.
5. Brush melted butter mixed with garlic powder, parsley flakes, and Italian seasonings over the biscuits while still hot.
6. Serve hot. You may also substitute soda water or ginger ale for the water.
